description: On the landing strip of the Iliad, Skye confronts Jiaying as Jiaying attempts to escape with the Terrigen Crystals. Skye pleads with her mother, but Jiaying lashes out, using her powers to consume Skye’s life force. Skye fights back, using her own powers to destroy the Crystals and defend herself. The heartbreaking standoff ends with Cal intervening, killing Jiaying to save Skye, fulfilling his promise to protect their daughter. The emotional fallout is powerful as Cal cradles Jiaying’s body.

transcript.line: Mom! Stop! You can't do this!
No, put them on the jet and get ready for takeoff.
I can't let you leave with those crystals.
You can, and you should. It's the only way to protect our people.
It's not. There are other ways.
Whose ways? S.H.I.E.L.D.? No. Their way is what got us here.
You started this war.

This war started decades ago, when S.H.I.E.L.D. was founded to guard the world against people like us. And it will never end. But you and I together, think of how powerful we could be. We could launch a revolution, side by side.
I don't want your revolution, because this isn't about protecting me or your people. This is about hate.
No, you're wrong.
It's consumed you. You can't even tell right from wrong. I can't let you destroy any more lives.
My daughter. So beautiful. So strong.
Mom, what are you...
I always believed the reason I endured all that torture and pain was for you, that you were my true gift. But you're not. This is.
Don't... do this.
You made your choice. I'm sorry.
They're gonna keep coming.
Not if we take out the source.
Got her.
We're not bad. We're misled.
Attaboy, turbo.
Please. Stop. You don't have to do this. You don't have to live with that pain. I will.
Oh... Cal... what are you doing?
Keeping my promise.
